summary: Senior AWS Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience and deep hands-on background in Python, SQL, ETL/ELT, data platforms, and production reporting systems. Experienced building AWS-oriented data pipelines using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Python/Pandas, PySpark, and governed data workflows for regulated banking environments. Strong in data quality, reconciliation, schema design, operational support, documentation, monitoring, and stakeholder-facing analytics for Finance, Technology, and Operations audiences.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints, replacing manual reporting processes with automated, repeatable data workflows.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift-based analytics workloads, and governed reporting datasets for capacity and operational decision-making.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas and historical retention structures supporting analytics, executive reporting, forecasting, reconciliation, and long-running operational trend analysis.
Implemented data validation and quality checks across telemetry feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics to improve trust in recurring reporting cycles and stakeholder-facing dashboards.
Developed PySpark and Python processing patterns for large-scale telemetry and forecasting workloads, improving scalability and reducing dependency on manual spreadsheet-driven analysis.
Supported production data operations with monitoring, troubleshooting, documentation, runbooks, change awareness, and recurring reporting reliability in a regulated financial services environment.
Created interactive Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly dashboards surfacing capacity, utilization, and operational risk insights for senior technical and business stakeholders.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring data used to analyze Brand.com and critical hospitality system performance for engineering and business stakeholders.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to produce actionable optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Implemented EUM and transaction tracing workflows that improved visibility into web and mobile user journeys, enabling better operational reporting and root-cause analysis.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning and monitoring readiness assessments, translating platform requirements into practical instrumentation and reporting needs.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for an enterprise environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting high-volume operational telemetry and reporting needs.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts that automated performance reporting, replacing manual weekly exports with repeatable data delivery processes.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and technical documentation adopted as standards across client environments.
Partnered with J2EE, WebLogic, infrastructure, and business teams to troubleshoot production issues and translate operational requirements into usable monitoring and reporting workflows.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving performance and data correctness.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing utilities to verify migration correctness across millions of transaction records.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to support phased migration cutover, reconciliation, and production readiness.
Optimized transaction processing and database access patterns, reducing hardware footprint while maintaining sub-second query latency.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, C++, Java
skills.AWS Data Platform: Amazon S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Amazon Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts, AWS Bedrock concepts
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data ingestion, transformation logic, data lakes, data warehousing, data modeling, metadata/catalog concepts, reporting-ready datasets
skills.Data Quality & Governance: Validation rules, reconciliation checks, anomaly detection concepts, lineage documentation, access-control awareness, change management, regulated-environment practices
skills.Analytics & Reporting: Executive dashboards, operational reporting, stakeholder analytics, Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, QLIK; QuickSight/Tableau/Power BI exposure at awareness/adjacent level
skills.Big Data & File Formats: Apache Spark, PySpark, Hadoop/Hive, Parquet, Snappy compression, partitioning concepts, Apache Iceberg concepts and active learning
skills.Orchestration & Delivery: Airflow, Step Functions concepts, Git, GitHub Actions, CI/CD concepts, Docker, Agile/Scrum/Kanban, technical documentation
skills.Databases: Oracle, PL/SQL, PostgreSQL, MySQL, DB2, Redshift, Snowflake concepts and active learning
skills.Reliability & Operations: Monitoring, logging, alerting, troubleshooting, runbooks, production support, performance tuning, cost-aware query and pipeline design

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, and Bedrock concepts to support governed analytics, optimized storage, and AI-assisted access to enterprise data.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and reporting platform for banking-scale telemetry, using Prophet and scikit-learn models with Streamlit dashboards to support capacity planning and executive insight workflows.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic automation pipeline using Python, vector embeddings, FAISS, LLM APIs, quality gates, and structured JSON artifacts to score, tailor, generate, validate, and track job applications.
